touches.subject: Boost plumbing/HVAC projects with ROI-driven automation (variant B)
touches.body: Hi {{name}}, at {{company}} we help home-services pros like plumbers, HVAC techs, electricians, and remodelers fast-track quotes and dashboards. See how we slashed reporting time by 65% for a mid-size contractor. Would you be open to a 15-minute chat this week? Best, John

touches.text: Hi {{name}} — we empower home-services teams to automate quotes and project dashboards. Happy to share a brief case study.
Hi {{name}}, it’s John. We help trade pros win more bids by automating estimates and progress reports in days. 10-min chat this week?

touches.subject: Case study: How we cut project admin time for contractors like you (variant B)
touches.body: Hi {{name}}, here’s the case study showing a 65% reduction in admin tasks for a contractor. If it resonates, we can map a 90-min session to scope next steps. Free for a quick call? - John

touches.text: Following up: tailoring a blueprint for {{company}} to win more bids with automation.

touches.subject: ROI-focused proposal for {{company}} (variant B)
touches.body: Hi {{name}}, I’ve drafted a 3- tier ROI-driven plan focused on quick wins (estimate automation, dashboarding, and delivery timelines). Want me to send a lightweight scope?

touches.text: John here—want to lock a 15-min discovery call to see if this aligns with your goals?
Last attempt: I can draft a contractor-specific roadmap for {{company}} and share it if you’re open to a quick chat.
